agent_log.output_summary: F4 schedule/send scaffolding: zod schemas (scheduleSchema with offset-aware ISO + future-time check deferred to service; openTrackParamsSchema for UUID path params), service skeletons with three ATOMIC_*_SQL constants (closes F3 race), worker.ts created with paired runSendWorker/runSendWorkerForTests (production never-throws, test variant awaitable for deterministic sequencing), controller skeletons (send controller's setImmediate kick documented post-202), 3 new routes wired in spec mount order, env additions (SEND_SUCCESS_RATE=0.8, SEND_WORKER_DELAY_MS=0) + .env.example, packages/shared interfaces (ScheduleCampaignRequest, SendCampaignResponse). ADR-002 flipped proposed→accepted with full implementation detail. F3 atomic-transitions tech-debt entry marked RESOLVED. tsc clean, eslint 0 errors, all 59 F3 tests still green.

F4 service/worker/controller bodies filled per architect's hand-off. service.scheduleCampaign uses server-clock future check (400 SCHEDULED_AT_IN_PAST) + ATOMIC_SCHEDULE_SQL with affectedRows-then-fallback-SELECT (404 vs 409 CAMPAIGN_NOT_SCHEDULABLE without existence leak). service.sendCampaign uses ATOMIC_SEND_SQL same pattern, returns { id, status: 'sending' } (409 CAMPAIGN_NOT_SENDABLE). service.trackOpen uses ATOMIC_OPEN_TRACK_SQL silently (no throw — endpoint always 204; SQL JOIN embeds tenancy + idempotency guards). worker.runSendWorker (production never-throws) wraps runSendWorkerForTests (awaitable for tests) in try/catch+console.error. runSendWorkerForTests: optional SEND_WORKER_DELAY_MS setTimeout → findAll pending CRs → JS-side random-bucket → at most 2 bulk CampaignRecipient.update calls (sentAt stamped on both buckets) → atomic ATOMIC_SENDING_TO_SENT_SQL flip (WHERE status='sending'). controller.sendCampaign kicks worker via setImmediate AFTER res.status(202).json — verified ordering. controller.trackOpen validates both UUID params via openTrackParamsSchema. tsc clean, eslint 0 errors (1 pre-existing unrelated warning), all 59 F3 tests still green. F4 endpoints wired and ready for integration-tester.

F4 integration tests added across 3 new files. campaigns.schedule.test.ts (6 tests: happy / past-time SCHEDULED_AT_IN_PAST / wrong-state CAMPAIGN_NOT_SCHEDULABLE / tenancy-404 / non-ISO VALIDATION_ERROR / strict-body VALIDATION_ERROR). campaigns.send.test.ts (6 tests: happy with await runSendWorkerForTests + 5 recipients / 100-recipient distribution with both buckets non-empty / 202-not-200 shape / wrong-state CAMPAIGN_NOT_SENDABLE / tenancy-404 / empty-recipients still flips campaign sent). campaigns.open-track.test.ts (7 tests: happy stamps opened_at / idempotent second call doesn't advance opened_at / pending no-op / failed no-op / foreign-tenancy silent 204 with row state unchanged / non-UUID 400 VALIDATION_ERROR / E2E send+open producing non-zero open_rate). All 19 new tests assert via direct DB queries (CampaignRecipient.findByPk) where the endpoint is silent. F3 regressions: zero. Total: 78/78 tests pass across 12 suites (was 59 → now 78 ≥ 66 target). Lint 0 errors, build clean. No source bugs found; F4 implementation matched the architect/backend hand-offs exactly. Ready for code-reviewer.

F4 review verdict: APPROVED. No BLOCKER/HIGH/MEDIUM findings; only LOW notes (worker console.error style consistent with project; Math.random non-crypto acceptable for simulated send; 10ms idempotency-test sleep pragmatic). All 9 review-checklist sections (A. Atomicity / B. Worker / C. Open-track auth / D. Validation / E. Error mapping / F. Resource cleanup / G. Privacy / H. Test signal / I. ADR consistency) pass. Schedule SQL is single UPDATE with WHERE status='draft' + tenancy + affectedRows check + tenancy-scoped follow-up SELECT for 404/409 distinction (no existence leak); send SQL same pattern with status IN ('draft','scheduled'); worker's sending→sent flip is atomic with WHERE status='sending'; open-track SQL has tenancy JOIN inline. Worker is fire-and-forget via setImmediate AFTER res.json (verified line ordering); production wrapper try/catch never throws; test variant awaitable; bucket+bulk update at most 2 UPDATEs with empty-bucket skip; sentAt stamped on both buckets; Math.random < SEND_SUCCESS_RATE (strict <). requireAuth mounted on /campaigns covers nested open-track route; tenancy in SQL not just middleware; foreign-tenant test asserts row UNCHANGED. scheduleSchema.strict() rejects extra keys; openTrackParamsSchema validates UUIDs. ValidationError=400, NotFoundError=404, ConflictError=409 mapping correct. SEND_WORKER_DELAY_MS=0 short-circuits setTimeout. Open-track always 204; error handler doesn't leak. ADR-002 accepted with BullMQ preserved as alternative; F3 race tech-debt entry marked RESOLVED IN F4. All 11 DoD checkboxes from spec-schedule-send.md pass. Build clean, lint 0 errors, 78/78 tests across 12 suites. No fixes applied (none required). Ready for finalize/commit/push.
